Title: Chrome and Courtesy
Setting: Neutral ground — the Parallax Lounge, {location}, privacy field active
TextLines: The invitation came on actual paper — cream stock, embossed with the Kasumi Dynamics seal. Old-world power move.
Their handler is already seated when you arrive. Chrome jaw implant, tailored graphene suit, drink untouched. The privacy field turns the rest of the lounge into soft static.
"Your division has been... energetic. Our actuaries have noticed."
A data-slate slides across the table. Casualty projections. Yours and theirs. The numbers are not kind to either side.
"I'm here to discuss whether those numbers need to get worse, or whether we can find a more profitable arrangement."

Choices.Label: "Your actuaries should update their models. We're just getting started."
"This meeting never happened. Enjoy your drink."
